results.title: 01 two candies wake differently
results.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Image 1 controls Raul and Meg's identities, clothing, age relationship, and yellow Peelerz package, but not its park location. Relocate them to adjacent seats in crowded high-school football bleachers at dusk. Image 2 supplies Raul's orange anime energy only. Image 3 supports Meg's face only; reject its extreme mouth crop. Raul holds a peeled mango gummy whose curled golden skin contains three tiny energetic mango gummy characters just waking and raising their arms. Meg holds a half-open acid-green apple gummy from which one small green imp quietly peeks. Raul is excited; Meg looks privately curious. Keep both candy events readable and compact.
